name: Spicy Country-Style Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 small Fresh green or red chiles
1 large Red or green bell pepper
2 tbsp Rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. CUT THE CHICKEN BREASTS into shreds about 3 inches long.
2. Cut the fresh chiles in half, carefully remove the seeds and shred the chiles.
3. Prepare all the vegetables: rinse bamboo shoots and shred them; trim zucchini and shred it; wash bell pepper, remove seeds and shred it.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet until almost smoking.
5. Quickly stir-fry chicken shreds for 1 minute or until slightly firm. Remove cooked chicken and drain it.
6. Wipe the wok clean, then reheat with the remaining oil.
7. Add shredded chiles, bamboo shoots, zucchini, and bell pepper. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
8. Add the rest of the ingredients (chili bean sauce, granulated sugar, dark soy sauce, rice wine or dry sherry, chili bean sauce, vinegar, tomato paste) and mix well.
9. Continue stir-frying for another minute.
10. Return chicken shreds to the wok and give the mixture a few quick stirs to finish cooking the chicken.
11. Turn onto a serving platter and serve at once.
